chunks.title: Complaint about the Wicked
chunks.reason: The psalmist describes the arrogance and oppression of the wicked who deny God's presence.

chunks.title: Call for Divine Intervention
chunks.reason: The speaker urges Yahweh to arise and judge the wicked who have forgotten Him.

chunks.title: Declaration of God's Kingship
chunks.reason: The passage concludes with a declaration of Yahweh's eternal reign and a prayer for justice.
